ManagedAttribute.displayName: Manage installation and permission grants of selected Teams apps for all user accounts [on] Microsoft Graph

entry.value: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall selected Teams apps in any user account, without a signed-in user. Gives the ability to manage permission grants for accessing those specific users' data.
Manage installation and permission grants of selected Teams apps for all user accounts [on] Microsoft Graph
